title: Create: Magic 'n' Steams
description: Modpack based on Create with more magic and trains
body:
# Create : Magic Steams Create Magic Steams is a minecraft modpack around tech, trains and magic
# About the Modpack This modpack can be divided in three parts : - **Create (Alone)** : ~~Unlimited Version~~ Basic version (due to modrith limitation) so it's just create. - **Create Trains** : With Steams And Rails, you have new types of trains and more way to automate your tracks - **Magic** : With custom spells and items - And optimization. Because I dont have a nasa computer. # Why this modpack ? There is two case that you need this modpack : - One, you love trains and magic, in this cas you should download it right now - Two, you are my friend and I barely forced you to download it # Can we play on server ? **Yes !** Folow Modrith FAQ about it to add the modpack to the server ! **Edit :** The [Modrith Doc](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/modpacks/playing_modpacks/) only talk about adding it to a client. I will make a proper documentation about it, but now you can dowload the modpack on your client, and then transfer all the mod to your server # Issues Comming Soon
# Fabric Compatibility This modpack was first made for fabric but ASR is only compatible with forge. We are waiting for ASR compatibility to use it on fabric & quilt
